name: Localhost Apps
description: Preview web apps from discovered ports without leaving the current session.
keywords: Installed sessions show discovered local app ports.
Pick a detected port to inspect the running app.

access.label: vibe-research catalog
access.detail: Localhost Apps is mirrored from the Vibe Research building catalog as manifest-only setup metadata.

capabilities.name: vr-playwright
capabilities.detail: Inspect a local app with a real browser.

steps.title: Enable the dock
steps.detail: Installed sessions show discovered local app ports.

steps.title: Open a preview
steps.detail: Pick a detected port to inspect the running app.

agentGuide.summary: Use Localhost Apps when an agent needs to discover, rename, preview, or expose web apps running from the workspace.
useCases: Find development servers discovered by Vibe Research.
Preview a local app through the Vibe Research proxy or direct URL.
Expose eligible localhost-only ports through the Tailscale portal when available.

commands.label: List discovered ports
commands.detail: Use the runtime app port if it differs from 4123.

commands.label: Open with Playwright
commands.detail: Inspect a local app with a real browser.
